coreIssue: This 1:1 is likely about whether Tom has recalibrated to Principal expectations on the new team or is still delivering below true Principal scope.
openingQuestion: How are you deciding where to step in early on alignment and tradeoffs so your Principal impact is visible across this team’s work?
listenFor: whether he names a specific recent decision where he aligned expectations early or realized he should have
whether he volunteers concrete cross-team counterparts and describes a trust-building interaction with them
if he stays at task-delivery examples and avoids naming ambiguous calls, tradeoffs, or moments he pushed beyond his immediate lane
avoid: do not turn this into a verdict on whether he is already meeting Principal level
do not overload the conversation with every gap at once instead of testing his current understanding of Principal scope
goodOutcome: You and Tom have agreed what Principal-level impact means on this team right now, including one cross-team area where he should exercise visible judgment and end-to-end ownership.
suggestedAction: Before the 1:1, pick one recent example where steady delivery was not enough and note the earlier alignment or broader judgment you expected from a Principal engineer.
